title: Code with Claude Tokyo 2026: Opening Keynote
summary: Anthropic is hosting the Code with Claude 2026 opening keynote in Tokyo, Japan. Engineering and product leaders from the company will present the latest updates at this event.
writeup: This video is the opening keynote for Anthropic's Code with Claude 2026 event, held in Tokyo, Japan. Engineering and product leaders from the company present the latest updates during the session. The talk frames what Anthropic chooses to highlight at the start of the event.
